reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: 社会変化に応じて目的・方法が常に再定義される
reiTyping.peaceCheckReason: 原則として人間の成長を促す。例外: 軍事教育・洗脳教育は flagged

falsifiability: 完全自律学習 AI が人間教育を不要にする場合、実践面の正当化が崩れる

description.ja: 知識・技能・価値観を世代間に伝承し、個人の能力開発を支援する社会的実践
description.en: Social practice of intergenerational transmission of knowledge, skills, and values; supports individual capacity development.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 教育は時間軸に沿って知識・技能・価値観を微分的に伝承する社会的積分過程である

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><polygon points='0 0, 10 3, 0 6' fill='#00d4ff'/></defs><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='35' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='2' opacity='0.6'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='25' fill='none' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='1.5' opacity='0.5' stroke-dasharray='3,2'/><g id='nodes'><circle cx='50' cy='20' r='4' fill='#00d4ff'/><circle cx='75' cy='35' r='4' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='75' cy='65' r='4' fill='#f59e0b'/><circle cx='50' cy='80' r='4' fill='#ffd700'/><circle cx='25' cy='65' r='4' fill='#00ff88'/><circle cx='25' cy='35' r='4' fill='#7c3aed'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='5' fill='#00d4ff' opacity='0.8'/></g><path d='M 50 20 Q 62 35 75 35' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 75 35 Q 75 50 75 65' stroke='#ec4899' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 75 65 Q 62 72 50 80' stroke='#f59e0b' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 50 80 Q 37 72 25 65' stroke='#ffd700' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 25 65 Q 25 50 25 35' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><path d='M 25 35 Q 37 28 50 20' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='1.2' fill='none' marker-end='url(#arrowhead)'/><text x='50' y='54' font-size='8' fill='#00d4ff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>FLUX</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 六層環流構造：知識(K)→技能(S)→価値観(V)→社会適応→世代伝承→個人開発が循環し、中核のFLUXで時間軸上の再定義が常に起動する
